chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Misc. Application No.S-24 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 25.11.2025 Mr. Afzal Kareem Virk advocate for the applicant. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Dalwani, D.P.G. = Learned counsel for the applicant does not press instant Criminal Miscellaneous application on the ground that case has been disposed of by learned trial court on merit. In view of above, instant Criminal Miscellaneous application is hereby dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE “Saleem”
